name: Rice with Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken until tender. Remove the meat from the bones and cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine the onion soup mix and chopped pimientos.
3. Alternate layers of rice, chicken pieces, and soup mixture in a baking dish. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until the cheese is melted and golden brown.
